name: shed full of radio equipment
description: I'm in a shed full of radio equipment
hints: The radio shed is critical for the endgame. There's an antenna lead and radio equipment here.
You need to connect a ham radio and battery to the antenna, then transmit the deactivation code.
CONNECT ANTENNA with the ham radio. You need a battery connected to power it. PUSH SWITCH to activate. Then TRANSMIT YOYODYNE to deactivate the bomb and win.
Full sequence: bring ham radio from lifeguard shack, CONNECT ANTENNA, attach battery, PUSH SWITCH, then TRANSMIT YOYODYNE. NORTH returns to Hickory Ave.

effects: Message: The earth is safe again.

needs: Battery attached to radio (must be in room)

notes: Radio equipment shed - WINNING LOCATION. Connect the ham radio to the antenna lead, power with battery, PUSH SWITCH, then TRANSMIT YOYODYNE to deactivate the bomb and save the earth. TRANSMIT WARFIN does nothing useful. NORTH returns to Hickory Ave (room 7).
